description: §38.12.8 — a consumer imports a channel named `chat` from TWO different source files (`./x.scrml` and `./y.scrml`), both declaring `export <channel name="chat">`. The two wire-identical channels would conflict on the same WebSocket route `/_scrml_ws/chat`, so CHX fires E-CHANNEL-008. (Multi-file: `x.scrml` + `y.scrml` are aux import fixtures.)
rationale: §38.12.8: cross-file channel imports SHALL have distinct `name=` values — two channels sharing the same wire-name from different source files conflict on one WS route. The consumer importing both SHALL emit E-CHANNEL-008. Resolution: rename the channel in one source file.
